channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Sony Interactive Entertainment shuts down Dark Outlaw Games
item.content:encoded:
Plus other cuts in mobile games development.

Sony Interactive Entertainment has closed Dark Outlaw Games, a studio led by Call of Duty veteran Jason Blundell it established in March 2025, according to a report from Bloomberg’s Jason Schreier.

Before Dark Outlaw Games’ establishment, Blundell co-founded Deviation Games, an independent studio that was working with Sony Interactive Entertainment on a new intellectual property—but was shut down in March 2024 following Blundell’s exit in September 2022. in December 2023, it was revealed that Blundell had been working for Sony Interactive Entertainment.

According to ResetEra’s J-Soul, who broke the story ahead of Schreier, Dark Outlaw Games was still in the early stages of its first project. It is unclear how many staff were employed by the studio.

Outside of Dark Outlaw Games, Sony Interactive Entertainment is making other cuts, including in mobile games development, with around 50 staff affected, according to Schreier. J-Soul added that these cuts are an effort to move away from the mobile market, while still supporting previously announced titles like MLB The Show Mobile and Ratchet & Clank: Ranger Rumble.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/sony-interactive-entertainment-shuts-down-dark-outlaw-games
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Age of Mythology: Retold DLC ‘Obsidian Mirror’ launches April 21
item.content:encoded:
Age of Mythology: Retold downloadable content “Obsidian Mirror” will launch on April 21, publisher Xbox Game Studios and developers World’s Edge, Forgotten Empires, Tantalus Media, CaptureAge, and Virtuos announced.

Here is an overview of the expansion, via its Steam page:

From across the ocean comes a glorious new world pantheon.

“Obsidian Mirror” introduces the Aztecs to Age of Mythology: Retold in a bold, long-requested expansion that reshapes how gods, mortals, and mythic power collide. Built for players eager to expand their experience and explore a mythology rarely seen in real-time strategy games, this expansion delivers new gods, mechanics, monsters, and an epic campaign driven by divine rivalry. Aztec mythology introduces themes explored at mythic scale in the real-time strategy, with an emphasis on sacrifice, illusion, and the flow of life and power.

Take command under three new Major Gods, each offering a distinct playstyle. Quetzalcoatl, the Feathered Serpent, rules as a wise priest-king, accelerating his people with the power of wind while strengthening culture and learning. Tezcatlipoca, the Smoking Mirror, embraces night, chaos, and sorcery, summoning underworld minions and bending reality through illusion. Huitzilopochtli, the god of sun and war, demands sacrifice and devotion, granting devastating power to those willing to give everything in his name.

Expand your divine influence with nine new Minor Gods, each bringing unique god powers, myth units, and strategic depth inspired by Aztec legend. Command deities such as Itzpapalotl, the obsidian butterfly of death and magic. Call upon Tlaloc, master of rain and destruction. Unleash Xolotl, whose corrupt influence twists enemies into monstrous forms.

“Obsidian Mirror” introduces Fear and Illusion gameplay, offering new ways to dominate the battlefield. Lay traps, manipulate enemy behavior, harvest life force, and construct towers from fallen foes. At the heart of Aztec power lies Tonalli, the essence of life released in battle. Every fallen warrior will fuel divine Favor and empower your gods and driving your civilization forward. Even your villagers can offer their life force when greater power is needed.

The all-new 12-mission campaign tells an epic story of divine conflict and survival. When the eternal rivalry between Quetzalcoatl and Tezcatlipoca destroys the utopian city of Aztlan, Huitzilopochtli seizes the moment to lead his people south in search of a new empire. Meanwhile, Tezcatlipoca escapes through his Obsidian Mirror, crossing continents to recruit legendary allies and reclaim his dominance. Gods will clash, alliances will fracture, and the fate of the Aztec people will be decided by blood, belief, and power.

“Obsidian Mirror” is a dramatic evolution of Age of Mythology: Retold. For fans who have waited years to see the Aztecs rise, and for strategy players drawn to bold mythic themes and inventive mechanics, this expansion delivers a fierce new vision of divine warfare.

Age of Mythology: Retold is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Xbox One, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/age-of-mythology-retold-dlc-obsidian-mirror-launches-april-21
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
